summary: Autonomous dedupe pass used the hydrated 2026-04-29 preflight artifact at main 9881a808f2fc0d5302f98a040a9efaad00336097. The representative #68634 is closed and the live open candidates split into distinct subfamilies, so there is no single safe cluster-wide canonical and no close/comment/label mutation is planned.
